response.justification: Sarah is an accomplished senior systems engineer with strong architectural expertise and IDE development experience from her National Instruments role (2014-2015). However, she lacks the core required qualifications: no demonstrated expertise in Java, Kotlin, or the JVM ecosystem, and no experience with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise application servers. Her recent 4+ years have focused on TypeScript/Node.js, suggesting the JVM skills needed here are not current. While her ability to master complex systems and language tooling is evident, the substantial gap in required technical depth makes this a risky hire unless she has significant undisclosed JVM background.
strengths: Senior-level systems architect with proven ability to design complex, distributed, high-performance systems
Direct IDE development experience from National Instruments LabWindows/CVI role plus custom language tooling and test framework creation
Strong emphasis on software craftsmanship, testing methodologies (TDD), and developer experience—values aligned with the role
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in Java, Kotlin, or deep JVM understanding despite these being core requirements
Missing required experience with Spring ecosystem, Hibernate, Quarkus, and application server integration
Recent 4+ years of TypeScript/Node.js focus suggests JVM-related skills are not current or prioritized

key_factors.factor: Spring and enterprise framework experience missing
Senior systems architecture and tooling design capability
